audit_items.proof_trace: transferForSwap (line 321) is called unconditionally before the per-asset loop (lines 324-357) where s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp (line 353) is set, guaranteeing the ordering invariant. When hasFeeAggregator is false (auction IS the fee aggregator), no external transfer is needed because the funds are already held in the contract, so the invariant holds semantically. The LiveAuction() revert at line 327 also prevents any re-entrant double-start.
